core_mechanism: reduction of a parametrized family of infinite series to a finite generating set of special constants that form a graded algebra closed under known bilinear (shuffle/stuffle-type) relations, then using those algebraic relations to collapse each series into a closed-form linear combination of basis constants
brief_reason: The abstract represents the deformed Apery-like series in terms of multiple Clausen values (a special class of cyclotomic multiple zeta values at level 3) and 'exploits provable algebraic relations among' them to derive explicit closed-form evaluations.
